security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:1420 ws://127.0.0.1:1420; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Codex and Claude usage at a glance.
bundle.longDescription: A private local Windows tray utility for viewing Codex and Claude usage, reset times, and recent usage history.
